document_title: The Chernobyl Accident in 1986 - Causes and Consequences
recommended_outputs: Timeline of the accident and response
reason: The document is a formal scientific lecture/report from Risø National Laboratory about the Chernobyl accident, including technical reactor causes, radionuclide release, radiation biology, dose estimates, international assessment work, health consequences, references, and an appendix on radiation dose quantities. Its structure, citations, quantitative tables, and scientific terminology make the research mode most appropriate.
warnings: The document includes OCR/formatting issues, especially in formulas, figure labels, units, and some duplicated or misspelled words.
Some figures and equations are only partially represented in text, so visual or mathematical details may be incomplete.
The document is dated 1994, so later scientific findings about Chernobyl health effects are not included.
